channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: What to read this weekend: Locked in with The Iron Garden Sutra
item.description:
Need something new for your reading list? This week, we recommend A.D. Sui's The Iron Garden Sutra, a meditative horror sci-fi/fantasy and murder mystery.
I don't typically gravitate toward locked room mysteries, but the description of this book ticked all the right boxes to win me over: "a death monk and a team of researchers trapped onboard a spaceship of the dead encounter something beyond human understanding." It has all the makings of a compelling murder mystery, which is fine on its own, but thanks to the philosophical musings of its main character, Vessel Iris, and a setting that al...

item.title: Honda is killing its EVs — and any chance of competing in the future
item.description: Honda's decision to kill its three EVs for the U.S. market will reverberate far beyond North America.

item.title: Test du Xgimi Titan : un vidéoprojecteur 4K laser taillé pour le très grand spectacle
item.description: Avec le Xgimi Titan, la marque chinoise change clairement de catégorie et attaque le segment des vidéoprojecteurs home cinéma très lumineux pensés pour les salles dédiées. Nous avons testé ce modèle 4K laser conçu pour les installations exigeantes.

item.title: On a observé une collision d'exoplanètes peut-être similaire à celle qui a fait naître la Lune !
item.description: On a parfois dit que l'astrophysique n'était pas une science parce qu'on ne pouvait pas faire directement des expériences sur les astres, contrairement à ce qui se passe quand on fait, par exemple, dans les laboratoires sur Terre des expériences avec des atomes ou des noyaux. C'est oublié que la...

item.title: Zach Braff’s AI Relationship Denial Is Raising a Lot of Questions Already Answered by the Denial
item.description: The Scrubs star referred to himself as "The guy not dating his chatbot."

item.title: How to watch France vs England: Free Streams & TV Info as Les Bleus look to secure Six Nations
item.description: All the ways to watch France vs England live streams online – including for FREE – in the 2026 Six Nations round 5 clash at Stade de France.

item.title: Le DJI Avata 2 est prêt à partir à la conquête des airs avec un prix réduit de presque 100 euros pendant les Ventes Flash d’Amazon
item.description: Le DJI Avata 2 est un drone qui se manie facilement grâce au casque Goggles 3 et à sa télécommande fournie. Chez Amazon, l'appareil peut être trouvé pour 526 euros.

item.title: Meta reportedly considering layoffs that could affect 20% of the company
item.description: These layoffs could help Facebook's parent company offset its aggressive spending on AI infrastructure, as well as AI-related acquisitions and hiring.

item.title: While You Wait for ‘Crystal Lake’, This Fan Film Celebrates ‘Friday the 13th’ in Style
item.description: Another horror icon makes its way into animation with the 'Friday the 13th' fan film 'Ghosts in the Fog.'

item.title: Deepfake worries hit a new high as one in four Americans say they have received a deepfake voice call in the past 12 months — experts blame 'the weaponization of AI'
item.description: Deepfake AI voice scams are rising, spam calls overwhelm users, and many Americans demand carriers take responsibility for protection.

item.title: Meta is reportedly planning to cut up to 20 percent of its staff in upcoming layoffs
item.description: Meta could be preparing for one of the largest layoffs in its history, according to a Reuters report. The tech giant is planning to cut about 20 percent of its workforce, according to the outlet's sources. According to the report, neither a date nor the exact number of layoffs has been finalized yet. However, Reuters reported that Meta's top executives have told "other senior leaders" to start "planning how to pare back." In its latest financial report, the company's employee headcount was 78,865 as of December 31, 2025, while revenue reached nearly $60 billion for the fourth quarter and more ...

item.title: Meta pulling end-to-end encryption on Instagram DMs
item.description: Meta quietly announced the end of E2E encryption, which will terminate on May 8.

item.title: As people look for ways to make new friends, here are the apps promising to help
item.description: We've compiled a list of friendship apps, from friend discovery platforms like BFF to event-focused ones like Timeleft.

item.title: I tested my favorite Bose and B&O audiophile Bluetooth speakers in a head-to-head showdown — here's the one I'd buy with my own money
item.description: I've tested over 40 Bluetooth speakers, and after pitting these similarly priced Bang & Olufsen and Bose models against one another, there's only one I'd actually buy.

item.title: Hulu, Disney Plus, and the Pixel Watch 4 are among this week’s best deals
item.description: Happy Saturday, all! This week, we found a number of deals that should help you unwind and relax over the next few days (and beyond). If you’re planning to stream the Oscars on Sunday, there’s still time to take advantage of a great deal on Hulu and Disney Plus, as well as Google’s latest 4K […]

item.title: Digg shuts down for a 'hard reset' because it was flooded with bots
item.description: Digg has shut down, for now, just a few months after its open beta launched. Justin Mezzell, the company’s CEO, has explained on the home page that it noticed hours after the beta launched that it was already being targeted by SEO spammers. “The internet is now populated, in meaningful part, by sophisticated AI agents and automated accounts,” he wrote. Apparently, the Digg team wasn’t ready for the scale and the speed at which bots found and started flooding the website.Mezzell said Digg banned thousands of accounts and deployed both internal tools and external solutions, but they weren’t enou...
